name: portfolio-webpage
description: Personal developer portfolio website showcasing projects, skills, and experience.

scripts.test: cross-env AUTHJWT_VERIFY=false LOG_LEVEL=error MONGODB_CONNECTION_STRING=mongodb://127.0.0.1:50000/team_a c8 --reporter html --reporter text-summary mocha 'tests/**/*.js' --ignore 'tests/**/common.js' --ignore 'tests/helpers/**' --timeout 100000 --exit
